economic_notes: Nation has significant commercial enterprises including Orca Sand and Gravel LP (12% interest), Kwagis Power LP (25% interest, 41.5MW hydro facility), Atli Resources LP (logging), Kuterra LP (ceased operations Feb 2020, now leased to third party), Mama'omas LP (fishing licences), Danyas Forest Products LP (49.5% interest), and Namgis Business Development Corporation. Community benefit funds established from Kwagis Power and Orca Sand and Gravel distributions.
notes: Financial statements were cut off mid-page in the segmented information section (Commercial Enterprises, Social Housing Fund, Trust Fund). Prior year 2020 included forgiveness of debt (Treaty Loan) of $9,072,929 as a non-cash item. GBEs accounted for using modified equity method contributing $5,997,915 share of net income. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $8,116,727 + Province of BC $5,526,137 + First Nation Health Authority $4,651,185 + Fisheries & Oceans $3,872,041 + Other Federal Grants $1,720,269 + FNESS $418,518 + NVIAATS $207,318 + CMHC $45,376 + Nimpkish Fisheries Service $189,401 + Municipal services $114,812 + Licence lease $80,940 = adjusted; OSR includes sales, other, rental income, interest, contributions from related entities. Restricted cash calculated from Note 3 externally and internally restricted amounts. No remuneration schedule visible in extracted text. Natural Resources segment showed large BC provincial grant of $3,248,257 in 2021 vs $540,749 in 2020.
